---
title: "Class 1 - Introduction to python"
author: "Valentine Gilbart"
date : last-modified
theme:
  light: flatly
  dark: darkly
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    numbered: true
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
editor: source
---

## Aim of the class

Markdown is an easy to read and write text format:

- It's _plain text_ so works well with version control
- It can be **rendered** into HTML, PDF, and more
- Learn more at: <https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/>

## Code Cell

Here is a Python code cell:

```{python}
import os
os.cpu_count()
```

## Equation
